description: Lush sweet, refreshing watermelon gummies made with a chef’s touch — vivid fruit flavor, a melt-into-chew texture, and a cannabis infusion blended cleanly into every bite. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 1:1:1 ratio. A flavorful indica option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
